zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行趋势延续
zh.content:
SOL/USD最新报66.21美元，日内上涨0.62%，价格运行于20日均线64.88上方，显示短期多头仍占据主动。当前价格接近66.35美元日内高点，表明市场买盘力量保持稳定，整体结构呈现震荡偏强格局。

从技术指标观察，MACD数值为0.488，维持在零轴上方，反映多头动能仍然存在，短期趋势偏向上行。虽然RSI数据暂缺，无法判断超买超卖状态，但价格持续站稳均线之上，说明市场情绪相对积极。

关键支撑位关注65.70美元附近，对应日内低点区域；若跌破该位置，可能回测20日均线64.88美元。上方首要阻力位位于66.35美元，突破后有望进一步挑战67.00至68.00美元区间，打开新的上涨空间。

交易策略方面，短线投资者可关注66.35美元突破情况，放量站稳后可顺势跟进。稳健型投资者则可等待回踩65.70至64.90美元支撑区域再考虑布局。若价格跌破20日均线并持续走弱，应控制仓位并设置止损，以防趋势转弱。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is maintaining a constructive short-term bullish tone, trading at 66.21 after a modest 0.62% daily gain. Price action remains firm above the 20-period simple moving average at 64.88, indicating buyers continue to control the near-term trend. The narrow intraday range between 65.72 and 66.35 suggests consolidation rather than weakness, with market participants digesting recent gains while preserving upward momentum.

The moving average structure supports a positive outlook, as the current price sits approximately 2% above the SMA(20). MACD at 0.488 signals underlying bullish momentum remains intact, although the absence of a signal-line reading limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions, but current price behavior does not indicate excessive buying pressure.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near 65.70, corresponding to the session low, with stronger support emerging around the SMA(20) at 64.88. A break below these levels could invite additional selling pressure toward the 64.00 area. On the upside, resistance is visible near 66.35, the recent high. A decisive move above this barrier could open the door for a test of the 67.00–68.00 region, where profit-taking activity may increase.

Traders with a bullish bias may look for continuation opportunities on sustained closes above 66.35, using support levels as risk-management reference points. More conservative participants could wait for either a confirmed breakout or a pullback toward the 65.00–65.50 zone before considering entries. While the broader short-term structure remains favorable, disciplined position sizing and stop-loss placement remain important given cryptocurrency market volatility and the potential for rapid price swings.
